goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The default missing mode still performs the established shortage action, but T070 replaced its accessible name. Preserve the visible new missing/all wording and give only the initial missing-mode button a compatible accessible name containing both Make shortage list and Make missing-items list.

worker_package.objective: Add one conditional compatible accessible name in MealPlanPantryDemand, then run focused/type/build and all three unchanged E2E oracles plus integrity.
verify: Require component pre-hash C1D3B05545F8EB7F603EE9CF81E2FAE6F3383A1893460C0724CCCCA1BBB709E5 and protected hashes.
Only initial missing-mode label includes both phrases; visible text and all modes/states unchanged.
Run scoped format/lint, focused unit, typecheck, mirror/build.
Release port and prove component-only diff/protected hashes.
stop_if: Label-in-name or exact unique locator fails.
Protected oracle needs edit or shared/live/secret/normal data touched.

evidence: Default mode remains missing and posts the same endpoint.
Protected workflow selects established Make shortage list.
New grocery test does not depend on button text; label can preserve visible wording and semantics.

parallel_safety.rationale: One component, build, and three oracles share a serial lifecycle.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
